items.title: Job seekers giving up: Labor force participation rate falls to lowest in 50 years, outside of Covid era
items.description: A drop in the unemployment rate helped provide some upside to what was an otherwise downbeat jobs report — but it was for all the wrong reasons.

items.title: Trump says 'everybody's profiting' from recent market rallies — but it’s mostly the 1%
items.description: A large share of U.S. households have no exposure to equities and have not benefited from the bull market.

items.title: House lawmakers approved a bipartisan bill to protect older adults from financial fraud. Here's what to know
items.description: The Financial Exploitation Prevention Act of 2025 is aimed at preventing adults age 65 or older or those with disabilities from losing their money to fraud.

items.title: Stock market gains minted nearly 1 million new millionaires in 2025, new UBS report says
items.description: Global personal wealth surged by 10.8% in 2025, the biggest jump since 2017, according to UBS.

items.title: Sandwich chain Jersey Mike's files for IPO, reports 50% same-store sales growth in recent years
items.description: Jersey Mike's has nearly 3,300 locations, making it the second-largest hoagie sandwich chain in the U.S. behind Subway.

items.title: Married Americans tend to be wealthier and happier. Gen Z is forgoing the institution anyway
items.description: Gen Z defines the American Dream as having financial stability and being happy. Marriage could help them reach both of those goals, but many aren't sold on it.

items.title: High-end camping and a capital raise: AutoCamp is banking on summer travel to fuel growth
items.description: AutoCamp offers Airstream suites, polished cabins, fire pits, design-forward amenities and access to iconic outdoor destinations.

items.title: Premier Lacrosse League plans to bring in team owners by 2028 'or soon thereafter,' co-founder says
items.description: Paul Rabil told CNBC he's banking on the 2028 Los Angeles Summer Games, where lacrosse will return as an Olympic sport, to shine a spotlight on PLL.

items.title: Why Jim Cramer says investors should 'want to own' this industrial stock
items.description: The Investing Club holds its "Morning Meeting" every weekday at 10:20 a.m. ET.

items.title: Treasury says Trump Account investment options will include State Street, BlackRock and Vanguard ETFs
items.description: The Treasury Department said the investment lineup for Trump ‌Accounts includes ETFs from State Street, BlackRock and Vanguard.

items.title: Tesla stock sinks 7% despite strong deliveries report
items.description: Tesla is trying to recover from consecutive annual declines in vehicle sales that were partly caused by a consumer backlash against CEO Elon Musk.

items.title: Ford CEO wants level playing field with Toyota, GM imports as USMCA trade talks reopen
items.description: Ford reports it assembled over 2 million vehicles in the U.S. last year – more than any other auto manufacturer, including 311,000 units for export.

items.title: Rivian raises 2026 delivery outlook while Lucid misses Wall Street expectations for second quarter
items.description: Rivian is increasing its delivery outlook to between 65,000 and 70,000 EVs, up from 62,000 to 67,000 units.

items.title: Ford Q2 sales drop 10.3% due to F-Series supplier issue, falling EV demand
items.description: Ford said its EV sales fell by 40.7% during the quarter compared with a year earlier, while sales of its F-Series trucks, including the F-150, declined 11%.

items.title: Autonomous drone startup Quantum Systems raises $1.2 billion as investors pile into defense
items.description: Defense tech startups are raising record amounts on both sides of the Atlantic amid a flurry of investment in the sector.

items.title: Americans are paying record prices for steak. Here's why demand isn't cracking
items.description: Despite record beef prices, Americans aren't giving up steak. Consumers are treating beef as an affordable luxury and prioritizing it for special occasions.

items.title: Led by Buc-ee’s and new rival Dolly Parton, America’s gas station chains are in a mega-sizing era
items.description: Gas station chains led by Buc-ee's are coming closer to rivaling America's big box stores in size, and Dolly Parton is getting in on the retail trend.

items.title: Russia launches massive strike on Ukraine as Poland scrambles jets, Finland restricts airspace
items.description: The Russian Defense Ministry said that it launched a "massive strike using long-range precision air, land, and sea-based weapons and attack drones."

items.title: Brookfield wants to build AI data centers in London’s answer to Wall Street
items.description: Brookfield's CEO said the firm is bringing data centers to London's Canary Wharf, as demand for AI infrastructure in the U.K. soars.

items.title: How high hopes for Biden’s student-loan forgiveness plans cost borrowers
items.description: The Biden White House's lofty expectations for its loan forgiveness efforts inadvertently  damaged the financial situation of many student loan borrowers.
